task: Find an energetic hairless dog with medium barking.
thoughts: I can see the AKC website is loaded. I need to find a dog breed finder tool that allows filtering by characteristics. Let me look for the breed finder under "Dog Info".
I can see the Dog Info menu is open. I'll click on "Breeds A-Z" to access the breed listing with filters.
Let me click on the arrow next to "Breeds A-Z" to navigate to the breeds page.
Let me click on "View All AKC Breeds" directly.
I can see the Dog Breeds page with filters. I need to apply filters for coat type (hairless), activity level (energetic), and barking level (medium). Let me start with the COAT TYPE filter.
It seems I was redirected to a different website. Let me go back to the AKC dog breeds page.
Good, I'm back on the AKC Dog Breeds page. Let me expand the ACTIVITY LEVEL filter first.
The page has loaded with ads at the top. Let me scroll down to see the filters.
Now I can see the filters. Let me click on "ACTIVITY LEVEL" to expand it.
I can see the ACTIVITY LEVEL filter expanded with "Regular Exercise" checkbox. I need to scroll down to see if there are more options including "Energetic".

I see the ACTIVITY LEVEL only shows "Regular Exercise". This might not have all the options I need. Let me try navigating to the AKC breed selector tool which may have more detailed filtering options.
That page didn't load properly. Let me go back to the dog breeds page and try again with the filters.
Good. Let me scroll down to the filter section and expand the COAT TYPE filter first.
I can see the filters now. Let me click on "COAT TYPE" to expand it.
The COAT TYPE filter is expanding. Let me scroll down to see its options.
I can see the COAT TYPE options. Let me select "Hairless" first.
"Hairless" is now selected. Now let me expand the ACTIVITY LEVEL filter to select "Energetic".
I can see from the page text that the ACTIVITY LEVEL only has "Regular Exercise" as an option. Let me now select "Medium" under BARKING LEVEL. Let me click to expand BARKING LEVEL.
Let me click on "BARKING LEVEL" to expand it.
I can see the BARKING LEVEL options. Let me select "Medium".

"Medium" barking is now selected. I also have "Hairless" coat type selected. Now I also need to select "Regular Exercise" under Activity Level since that's the closest to "energetic". Let me check that too.
All three filters are selected: Regular Exercise, Medium barking, and Hairless coat type. Now I need to scroll down to find the SUBMIT button and click it.
I can see the SUBMIT button. Let me click it to apply the filters.
The filters are applied. Let me scroll down to see the filtered results.
No results with all three filters. Let me remove the "Regular Exercise" activity level filter and search with just Hairless coat + Medium barking. Let me scroll up to uncheck Regular Exercise.
Let me uncheck "Regular Exercise" to remove that filter.
The checkbox still appears checked. Let me try clicking directly on the checkbox again.
Let me try clearing all filters and starting fresh. I'll click "CLEAR ALL".
Let me try navigating directly with the URL parameters for just Medium barking and Hairless coat type.
Let me scroll down to see the filtered results.

I can see three hairless breeds with medium barking: American Hairless Terrier, Chinese Crested, and Peruvian Inca Orchid. Let me scroll down to check if there are more results and then check which one is described as "energetic".

I can see 4 hairless breeds with medium barking: American Hairless Terrier, Chinese Crested, Peruvian Inca Orchid, and Xoloitzcuintli. Let me check each breed's energy level. Let me click on "American Hairless Terrier" first.
I found it! The **American Hairless Terrier** is described as "alert / curious / **energetic**". Let me scroll down to confirm its barking level is listed as Medium.
I can see the breed traits section. Let me scroll down to find the energy level and barking level traits.
Let me click on "ALL TRAITS" to see the energy level and barking level.
Let me scroll down to find the barking level and energy level traits.
